command: SAR_HELPERS_DIR=<dir with cmg777 helpers + california_smoking.rda> Rscript benchmarks/reference/spillsynth_prop99_sar/reference.R
reference_impl: Mendez tutorial Rcpp helpers (sc_spillover / hs_alpha_gibbs_cpp / sar_full_sampler_cpp_step2), an 'inspired-by' variant of Sakaguchi-Tagawa
notes: The California panel/W/w vendored in basedata match california_smoking.rda from the tutorial (38 donors, 1970-2000). rho is weakly identified in the full config (AR(1) factor vs spatial autoregression ridge): this tutorial helper settles near rho~0.24, mlsynth near rho~0.41, while the ATT agrees within ~5%; the bare-model spatial core matches to 4 dp. Against the authors' canonical Rcpp (spillsynth_sudan) mlsynth's rho matches to 0.004. The benchmark cross-checks the identified quantities and treats full-model rho as weakly identified.
